overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic dark fantasy game showing a character in a long coat exploring a mysterious winter forest filled with glowing blue webs and massive ancient trees. The character traverses rocky terrain, passes stone ruins with circular carvings, and walks beneath fallen trees in a moody, atmospheric environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky forest path with glowing blue webs

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy forest toward distant figures, navigating between massive trees and glowing webs

notable_agents.action: two distant figures standing motionless in the path ahead

entered.detail: towering trees with thick trunks rising into the canopy
luminescent web-like structures draped between rocks and trees
uneven terrain covered with snow and scattered stones

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed forest path surrounded by massive ancient trees. Glowing blue webs illuminate the rocky snow-covered ground. Two distant figures stand motionless far ahead on the path, barely visible through the atmospheric haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense web area before stone wall with circular carvings

events.description: approaching the massive stone wall with circular patterns carved into the rock face

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the massive stone wall with glowing symbols, then proceeding carefully through dense webs

entered.detail: massive rock face with three large circular carved patterns and intricate glowing symbols
massive fallen tree trunk forming a natural archway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a semi-covered area dense with glowing blue webs. A massive stone wall with mysterious circular carvings dominates the view ahead. The character approaches this ancient structure while passing under a fallen tree arch on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow rocky passage with ancient ruins

events.description: passing under the root archway into a narrow rocky passage with stone ruins

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrow rocky passage beneath fallen trees and exposed roots

entered.detail: ancient stone walls and broken structures lining the path
tight rock formations creating a canyon-like passage

segments.scene_description: Moving past the stone wall, the character enters a narrow enclosed passage between rocky cliffs. Ancient stone ruins line the left side while massive tree roots form archways overhead. The glowing webs become sparser as the character progresses through the canyon-like terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snowy forest path with fallen tree arches

events.description: flock of birds flies overhead through the forest canopy

agents.ego_description: walking through the wider snowy forest as birds fly overhead, approaching the distant forest exit

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying overhead through the tree canopy

entered.detail: massive horizontal tree trunk spanning the path like a gateway
bright exit visible through the trees ahead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wider snowy forest path with massive fallen trees forming natural arches overhead. The sky becomes partially visible through the canopy. A flock of birds flies overhead as the character approaches a brighter opening in the distance, leaving the dense webs and ruins behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, web-strewn forest that gradually opens into a brighter, airy woodland. It begins on a narrow path where glowing blue webs illuminate the snowy ground and distant figures loom through a thick atmospheric haze. As the character advances, the environment shifts into a semi-covered area where the camera passes under a fallen tree arch to reveal a massive stone wall etched with circular carvings. The scene then tightens into a canyon-like passage between rocky cliffs and ancient ruins, with massive tree roots forming overhead archways as the glowing webs begin to fade. Finally, the camera emerges from the enclosure into a wider snowy path beneath natural arches of fallen trees, following a flock of birds toward a bright opening in the distance.
